articles.title: Can Worldbuilding Help India Imagine New Futures? A Kolkata Start-Up Thinks It Can
articles.summary: Most Indian games borrow worlds. Indofuturism Dasein Game Lab wants to build new ones. Through hackathons, education programmes, and original IPs like Nishir Daak, the Kolkata-based initiative is rethinking how India imagines the future of gaming.
